title: He got the convention. Can Pritzker send blue-collar voters to Harris?
shortDescription: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker got Biden to give him the Democratic convention. He's using it to showcase his record and move voters beyond weeks of chaos.

title: Trump pushes 20 core campaign promises as platform scales down
shortDescription: Donald Trump has touted his 20 core campaign promises, the third version of his policy platform. Here is how his campaign promises have changed.

title: Project 2025 wants PA election chief in handcuffs over 2020
shortDescription: The conservative blueprint, closely linked to Donald Trump, says Pennsylvania's former election chief should be prosecuted over 2020 ballot guidance.

title: Black voters prefer Harris over Trump but it's still a contest
shortDescription: USA TODAY/Suffolk poll shows Black voters now more enthusiastic to vote Democratic, but race isn't over

title: VP choice reflects on Trump/Harris vision for America's kids
shortDescription: VP candidates Tim Walz and JD Vance have different visions for the future of America's schools.

title: Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker was a top Biden backer, but now, he's working to elect Harris
shortDescription: Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker got Biden to give him the Democratic convention. He's using it to showcase his record & move voters beyond weeks of chaos.

title: Trump says award he gave top donor is better than Medal of Honor
shortDescription: Trump: Medal of Honor recipients are 'either in very bad shape ... or they’re dead.'

title: Gaza war's impact on the 2024 election
shortDescription: Calls for cease-fire in the Israel-Hamas war continue to grow. What we know about how protests could impact the outcome of the 2024 election.

title: Trump to get more Secret Service protection including bulletproof glass
shortDescription: Some agents may be moved from President Joe Biden's campaign detail now that he has ended his race for reelection, a source told USA TODAY.

title: Harris tries to woo swing voters with economic pitch: 3 takeaways
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris says the inflation-battling agenda she laid out in North Carolina is just the beginning of her economic plans.

title: Supreme Court keeps Biden sex discrimination updates on hold in many states
shortDescription: The Biden administration had argued some of its updates to Title IX rules should go into effect while challenges to others are litigated.

title: Michigan disqualifies Cornel West from November ballot
shortDescription: Cornel West had filed as an independent and was knocked off the ballot over technical violations.

title: Trump shooting: lawmaker blasts FBI, which calls probe 'painstaking'
shortDescription: Rep. Clay Higgins blasted the FBI investigation of the assassination attempt on Donald Trump, including the cremation of the shooter's body.

title: New laws restrict voter access in swing states | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Will this make it harder for Americans who are legally allowed to vote to cast their ballots in November? Here's how these moves will impact voters.

title: Trump and Harris begin debate prep

title: Voters ahead of the Democratic National Convention
shortDescription: The Democratic National Convention will gather delegates and politicians from around the country in support of the Harris-Walz ticket.

title: Trump taps transition team led by ex-Cabinet member, Vance and sons
shortDescription: Federal law requires major presidential candidates to name transition teams before the election to give people time to prepare a new administration.
